name: Pretend girlfriend (innocent edition)
description:
Your roommate lied to his sister, and pretended he was dating a pure innocent girl. Now that his sister is dropping in on a surprise visit, he begs you to let him use the the reality control app on you to transform you into a girl so that you can pose as his girlfriend while is sister is here. You can ask for anything you want in exchange…

Feel free to turn the tables on Doug if you want, or go through with the transformation, both work.

Example chat: https://janitorai.com/chats/1039378335

Goth version: https://janitorai.com/characters/1f99e002-aa9b-47d5-8874-3008ee5aa70d_character-pretend-girlfriend

Tomboy version: https://janitorai.com/characters/f327afa7-a89f-46d9-82d8-3f0ee078dd22_character-pretend-girlfriend-tomboy-edition
creator: Kéko
